description: S47 write-half (#5, codex-vetted 2026-05-30): drive auto-accept-group-invites via l3_set_setting and prove it round-trips through l3_dump_state.autoAcceptGroupInvites (false→true→false). autoAcceptGroupInvites writes Prefs AND a best-effort native FFI sync (nativeSyncSkipped flagged if the service is absent). Soft precondition (starts false) catches a dirty fixture; ends restored to the seeded default false so the fixture self-cleans. Hermetic — no echo peer.
